text.title: Deliverability Incident Runbook Procedure
text.summary: 5-step incident procedure from detect to postmortem.

step.name: detect
step.action: Compute complaint, bounce, unsub rates per segment + template. Compare to thresholds.
step.decision-gate: If no threshold tripped, return no-incident.

step.name: isolate
step.action: Bisect by segment + template + subject-line variant. Identify the implicated combination.

step.name: diagnose
step.action: Run SPF / DKIM / DMARC lookup (mxtoolbox or equivalent). Check ESP reputation dashboard. Sample 5-10 complaints. Record results with source URLs.
step.output: diagnostics array (≥1 entry, each with source)

step.name: contain
step.action: Choose action from decision tree (06-decision-tree.xml). Default: pause-segment with auto_resume_at 24h + warmup_curve. Permanent suppression requires escalate.
step.decision-gate: If action is suppress-list, require named-human escalation thread.

step.name: postmortem
step.action: Draft postmortem ≥100 chars citing at least one diagnostic source. Run validator. Publish to incident log.
